item.title: Watch closely: a leaf reveals a hidden process
item.description: A leaf seems to do the impossible as a hidden life process is revealed in a simple, educational science demonstration.

media:content.media:title: Watch closely: a leaf reveals a hidden process
media:content.media:description: A leaf seems to do the impossible as a hidden life process is revealed in a simple, educational science demonstration.

item.title: I got this sand wet
item.description: A simple science demo shows how sand can be made wet

media:content.media:title: I got this sand wet
media:content.media:description: A simple science demo shows how sand can be made wet

item.title: Boiling dry water looks impossible
item.description: A simple reveal makes the science feel almost fake

media:content.media:title: Boiling dry water looks impossible
media:content.media:description: A simple reveal makes the science feel almost fake

item.title: No friction?
item.description: A simple science demo explores what happens when friction is reduced, making a familiar force easy to see and understand.

media:content.media:title: No friction?
media:content.media:description: A simple science demo explores what happens when friction is reduced, making a familiar force easy to see and understand.

item.title: This dive creates a massive splash... how?
item.description: A dive creates a huge splash, and the video breaks down why it happens using a simple science demonstration.

media:content.media:title: This dive creates a massive splash... how?
media:content.media:description: A dive creates a huge splash, and the video breaks down why it happens using a simple science demonstration.

item.title: Pythagoras cup explained
item.description: A simple science demo of the Pythagoras cup and how it works.

media:content.media:title: Pythagoras cup explained
media:content.media:description: A simple science demo of the Pythagoras cup and how it works.

item.title: Chocolate holograms
item.description: The reveal is stranger than it sounds

media:content.media:title: Chocolate holograms
media:content.media:description: The reveal is stranger than it sounds

item.title: The weird reason chicken heads don't move
item.description: Chickens are weirder than you thought

media:content.media:title: The weird reason chicken heads don't move
media:content.media:description: Chickens are weirder than you thought

item.title: Singlet oxygen explained
item.description: In this video I show you how the light for one of the world's most poserful laser's is made. The COIL laser for the YAL-1 laser uses light that is easily made by combining two chemicals to produce singlet oxygen

media:content.media:title: Singlet oxygen explained
media:content.media:description: In this video I show you how the light for one of the world's most poserful laser's is made. The COIL laser for the YAL-1 laser uses light that is easily made by combining two chemicals to produce singlet oxygen

item.title: How can glass be cut underwater?
item.description: A science experiment reveals an unusual way glass can be cut underwater, with a result that’s stranger than it sounds.

media:content.media:title: How can glass be cut underwater?
media:content.media:description: A science experiment reveals an unusual way glass can be cut underwater, with a result that’s stranger than it sounds.

item.title: Soap film holds in a surprising way
item.description: A soap film appears to hold in place, revealing a simple physics effect that makes the unexpected feel obvious.

media:content.media:title: Soap film holds in a surprising way
media:content.media:description: A soap film appears to hold in place, revealing a simple physics effect that makes the unexpected feel obvious.

item.title: A robot and Asimov's first law
item.description: I built a robot that breaks the first law of robotics and then show you Dax who is the opposite of that.

media:content.media:title: A robot and Asimov's first law
media:content.media:description: I built a robot that breaks the first law of robotics and then show you Dax who is the opposite of that.
